# Copilot instructions

Operate this repo through `make`. Run `make help` and use the target that matches
the request — `add`, `update`, `list`, `search`, `install-skills`,
`uninstall-skills`, `status`, `stats`, … The `## ` text on each target is its full
usage (parameters included), so you do **not** need to open the `Makefile` to
confirm, and you should not hand-roll `meta`/`git` commands.

Fuller context — what a meta-repo is, how the sub-repos are materialized, and the
conventions for adding repos — is in [`CLAUDE.md`](../CLAUDE.md) at the repo root.
Read it as the source of truth.
